planner.notes: No BLOCKED items. All open questions resolved as assumptions (filter state stays local to CatalogScreen, no new store; BiomarkerTag replaced by FunctionalBenefit mapped to ActiveIngredientKey[], AND semantics preserved from the existing Gate 3 in applyFilters). Related prior task: progress/shelf-filtering.md (2026-06-27, ACCEPTED) shipped the code this task replaces. FE-13-1..FE-13-8 all unblocked and ready for qa-lead test blueprints.

qa_lead.notes: 34 integration/component tests written, none passing yet by design (TDD red state) since FE-13-1..FE-13-7 are unimplemented: `npx tsc --noEmit` confirms the only errors under tests/my-shelf-filter-bottomsheet/ are 'Cannot find module @/components/catalog/FilterSheet | CatalogFilterTrigger' and 'selectedBenefits does not exist in type Partial<CatalogFilterState>' — i.e. exactly FE-13-1/FE-13-4/FE-13-5, no incidental errors. Covers: Story1 AC1-3 (badge on/off, reopen preserves committed state, discards an abandoned uncommitted draft), Story2 AC1-5 (Product Type single-select incl. explicit deselect to All, Functional Benefit multi-select independent of Product Type, live Apply-button count pre-Apply, AND semantics with a case that disambiguates from OR, dismiss-without-Apply never commits), Story3 AC1-3 (Apply commits+closes, Clear All resets draft without closing, Clear All+Apply removes the badge), plus the empty-result-still-applyable state from spec section 5. Defines a binding accessibility-label contract for CatalogFilterTrigger not specified in the tech design ('Open filters' / 'Open filters, {n} active') and reuses CatalogFilterHeader's existing 'Show all products' / 'Filter by {label}' accessibilityLabel convention for the new sheet's chips. Uses the real (unmocked) @/constants/labels map in FilterSheet.test.tsx so tests double as a regression guard on FE-13-2's ingredient-to-benefit map, including the three corrected mappings from the tech design Assumptions section. FE-13-8 (applyFilters unit tests) intentionally NOT written here — owned by engineer per .claude/rules/testing.md and the tech design's own task assignment. Blocker/deviation flagged for engineer: tests/shelf-filtering/CatalogFilterHeader.integration.test.tsx and tests/shelf-filtering/CatalogScreen.integration.test.tsx will fail once FE-13-1/FE-13-7 land (retired BiomarkerTag vocabulary, deleted component) and are not in the tech design's task list to delete/update — engineer should retire or update them alongside FE-13-6/FE-13-7. Full detail in progress/my-shelf-filter-bottomsheet.md log entry dated 2026-07-06.

engineer.notes: FE-13-1..FE-13-8 implemented. tsc --noEmit clean. Fixed two regressions caused by deleting CatalogFilterHeader.tsx (tests/catalog/catalog-screen-hide-toggle.integration.test.tsx, tests/shelf-filtering/PaoChip.integration.test.tsx) by stubbing CatalogFilterTrigger/FilterSheet in those files. Confirmed pre-existing (not caused by this task, verified via git stash against base commit 5eccee1): tests/catalog/product-detail.test.tsx and tests/catalog/catalog-screen.test.tsx fail on base; PaoChip is dead code (defined in CatalogScreen.tsx but never rendered) predating this task, so tests/shelf-filtering/PaoChip.integration.test.tsx's assertions fail even after the crash fix. UNRESOLVED: tests/my-shelf-filter-bottomsheet/FilterSheet.test.tsx has 12/21 failing — getByText can't find text inside the real (unmocked) Button component, apparently because this jest environment renders through react-native-web and Button's Text child collapses into the DOM button's raw text rather than a queryable Text node. Not root-caused to a fix. Full detail in progress/my-shelf-filter-bottomsheet.md log entry dated 2026-07-06.

tech_lead.notes: Design fidelity confirmed verbatim against docs/tech-design/my-shelf-filter-bottomsheet.md: FunctionalBenefit/CatalogFilterState/CATALOG_FILTER_DEFAULT (src/types/index.ts), FUNCTIONAL_BENEFIT_LABELS/FUNCTIONAL_BENEFIT_INGREDIENTS incl. all 3 corrected mappings (src/constants/labels.ts), applyFilters/activeFilterCount/hasActiveFilters/sheetOpen wiring (src/screens/CatalogScreen.tsx), CatalogFilterTrigger.tsx and FilterSheet.tsx prop contracts. CatalogFilterHeader.tsx confirmed deleted, zero dangling references. No BiomarkerTag/selectedBiomarkers remnants anywhere in src/ or tests/. No AsyncStorage/fetch/store violations; no hardcoded colors in the 2 new files. npx tsc --noEmit -> 0 errors (re-verified). Independently verified via an isolated git worktree at base commit 5eccee1 (not stash, to avoid disturbing unrelated uncommitted work): (a) tests/catalog/product-detail.test.tsx and tests/catalog/catalog-screen.test.tsx fail identically on base - pre-existing, confirmed; (b) PaoChip has zero <PaoChip JSX call sites on both HEAD and base - pre-existing dead code, confirmed. (c) Root-caused FilterSheet.test.tsx's 12/21 failures beyond the engineer's partial diagnosis: src/components/ui/core/Button.jsx (a plain react-dom design-reference stub, git-tracked since commit 092f7e4, predating this task) shadows Button.tsx under Jest because Jest's default moduleFileExtensions (['js','mjs','cjs','jsx','ts','tsx',...], confirmed via jest --showConfig) resolves .jsx before .tsx; Button.jsx renders {children} as a raw string with no <Text> wrapper, which getByText cannot find. Confirmed every expected string (e.g. 'Apply Filters (6 products)') is present verbatim in the failing tests' rendered output, proving FilterSheet's own logic is correct and this is a pure query-match failure. Confirmed production is unaffected: metro.config.js's expo/metro-config sourceExts is ordered oppositely (['ts','tsx',...,'js','jsx',...]), so the real app correctly resolves Button.tsx. This is a pre-existing, repo-wide, Jest-only test-infra defect (24 shadow .jsx/.prompt.md files under src/components/ui/), not introduced by or in scope for this task - other suites avoid it only by mocking Button (one such pre-existing mock confirmed in tests/shelf-filtering/PaoChip.integration.test.tsx). FE-13-8 unit tests independently reviewed as thorough and all passing. The 2 mid-task regression fixes reviewed via git diff as minimal and consistent with existing mocking conventions. Verdict: ACCEPT - ready for human merge. Non-blocking follow-ups recommended (not gating): (1) reorder package.json's jest.moduleFileExtensions to match metro.config.js (ts/tsx before js/jsx) as its own tracked test-infra task; (2) separate cleanup ticket for pre-existing PaoChip dead code; (3) FilterSheet's ~122-line component function is within the ~185-line AddToRoutineSheet precedent it mirrors, no action needed.

engineer_followup.notes: Applied the moduleFileExtensions fix per tech-lead's recommendation: package.json now has [ts, tsx, js, mjs, cjs, jsx, json, node] (mjs kept in its original relative position after js, unlike metro's ordering, to avoid breaking @gorhom/bottom-sheet's transitive react-native-is-edge-to-edge .mjs dependency - a real regression from a first attempt that blindly copied metro's exact order, caught and fixed). This un-shadowed ~12 real ui/core and ui/forms components repo-wide as anticipated, surfacing two more pre-existing failures: tests/routine-engine/today-screen.test.tsx (fixed - asserted button.props.disabled, which RN's real Pressable never sets, folding it into accessibilityState.disabled instead; assertion corrected, now passing) and tests/routine-engine/add-procedure-modal.test.tsx (investigated at length, root-caused to an unrelated pre-existing timezone bug in AddProcedureModal.tsx's future-date check that reproduces identically on the unmodified base commit 5eccee1 right now due to the local-vs-UTC calendar-day boundary at time of testing - reverted all diagnostic changes, left unfixed and flagged for a separate ticket, same treatment as PaoChip). Also recovered from an unrelated accidental git stash pop (a stray WIP stash from a different branch, feature-add-vial-ux) with zero data loss - full detail in progress/my-shelf-filter-bottomsheet.md. Full suite: tsc clean, only pre-existing/out-of-scope failures remain (catalog-screen.test.tsx, product-detail.test.tsx, add-procedure-modal.test.tsx, PaoChip.integration.test.tsx), all verified pre-existing against base commit 5eccee1. FE-13's own scope is fully green. Status: READY_FOR_MERGE.
